summary: Iter97 Transport Driver KYC strict + Admin Validation: 26/28 backend pytest PASSED. 2 failures are transient preview-env 502/timeouts on /driver/register validation edge cases (infra flake, not code). Full KYC lifecycle verified: register(pending) → block online/available/accept → admin list/detail/approve/reject(reason<5 => 400)/suspend → resubmit after rejection → doc-change after approval resets to pending → suspended blocks re-registration → notifications row INSERTed with French title+emoji → driver_doc upload returns {main: image/webp<=1600, thumb: 600x600} → all 12 new columns + driver_kyc_decisions table present. Frontend: admin Transport tab IS MISSING on /admin page (P1), and Alice /transport didn't render DriverKycForm in smoke (P1).

critical.issue: asyncpg UndefinedColumnError: column r.vehicle_type does not exist on ride_requests — returns 500 when approved driver polls queue. Gate/KYC logic is fine but query fails. Regression from pre-iter97 schema: the vehicle_type column was never added to ride_requests table even though /request inserts into it. Driver cannot see rides post-approval.

minor.issue: Occasional 502 gateway timeouts on first hit through public URL (preview-env warmup). Not a code bug — retry succeeds.

ui_bugs.issue: Transport JAPAP tab NOT rendered between 'Publicités' (ads) and 'Paiements' (payments). Admin cannot access TransportDriversAdminTab UI — tab registration appears to be missing/broken in AdminPage.js.

DriverKycForm did not render in smoke test (page shows profile/communities modal instead). Cannot confirm DriverKycForm is reachable for a logged-in non-driver. Needs manual verify — might be auth-cookie handling difference (localStorage key), but still worth confirming the 'Devenir chauffeur' entry point is visible.

action_items: P1 backend: ALTER TABLE ride_requests ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS vehicle_type TEXT DEFAULT 'standard'; or ensure a DDL bootstrap exists. Blocks approved drivers from seeing /available.

P1 frontend: Register the 'Transport JAPAP' tab in /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.js between 'ads' and 'payments' with the Car icon and TransportDriversAdminTab content. Currently missing from rendered admin tab bar.
P1 frontend: Verify DriverKycForm is wired into /transport for non-driver users (is_driver=false or kyc_status!=='approved'). During smoke the form did not render.
P2 optional: Surface the 'ride_requests.vehicle_type' schema-bootstrap in services/driver_kyc.py (or a ride DDL service) so it's self-healing.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/transport.py uses driver_to_public in admin list which strips driver_id for non-driver dict — verified OK because drv has driver_id.
/available SQL filters WHERE r.vehicle_type = $1 but ride_requests.vehicle_type column missing — CRITICAL schema mismatch.
_record_decision inserts notifications with type='driver_kyc_<decision>' — schema compatible, INSERT verified in DB.
register_driver resets kyc_reviewed_at/by when docs change and approved → correctly forces re-review.
accept_ride and /online correctly gated on kyc_status=='approved'.
test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024!, alice@japap.com / Test1234! — logins via public URL are Turnstile-gated, used JWT-mint bypass (JWT_SECRET from backend/.env, same pattern as iter95/96).
seed_data_creation: Alice's drivers row and 3+ driver_kyc_decisions + 3+ notifications of type driver_kyc_* were created during testing. Module-scoped cleanup auto-deletes after run: DELETE FROM driver_kyc_decisions / drivers WHERE user_id IN (alice,bob).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend KYC flow is solid (26/28 pytest PASS, 2 flakes are preview-env 502s). Two P1s to fix before re-test: (1) ride_requests.vehicle_type column missing → /available 500, (2) Transport admin tab not appearing in AdminPage.js tab bar. Re-run `pytest tests/test_iter97_driver_kyc.py` after fix to confirm /available returns 200 in test_7. For the frontend, load /admin as admin@japap.com and verify a 'Transport JAPAP' tab exists between 'Publicités' and 'Paiements', clicking it shows 4 counter cards + driver list + modal with Approuver/Refuser/Suspendre.
rca of the issue: Schema drift: ride_requests.vehicle_type was never added when /request endpoint introduced the field. /available filter `WHERE r.vehicle_type = $1` fails with UndefinedColumnError. Mitigation: add DDL `ALTER TABLE ride_requests ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS vehicle_type TEXT DEFAULT 'standard'` in a bootstrap (e.g., ensure_driver_kyc_ddl or a new ensure_transport_ddl). Second RCA (frontend): TransportDriversAdminTab import likely missing or tab array entry missing in AdminPage.js — visible tabs on /admin are Dashboard/Utilisateurs/Transactions/Wallet Overview/Revenus/Support/KYC/Roue Fortune/Quiz & Tap/Mini-spin XAF/JAPAP PRO/Parrainage/Connect/Publicités/Paiements/Messaging/Staking/Statistiques/Paramètres/Audit — 'Transport JAPAP' is absent. Review /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.js for the new tab entry with icon=Car and id='transport'.
